commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content:
As an, perhaps Jethnan, or Ain, Josue xv. 23., and xxi. 15. Syriac adds Ethra. (Calmet)
Bethsemes. Alexandrian Septuagint subjoins, "Baither and its suburbs. "(Haydock)
All these cities were in the tribes of Juda and of Simeon. (Menochius)
